scripts.open:app: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const url = process.env.APP_URL || 'http://localhost:3000'; const commands = process.platform === 'win32' ? [['cmd', ['/c', 'start', '', 'explorer', url]]] : process.platform === 'darwin' ? [['open', [url]]] : [['xdg-open', [url]]]; const opened = commands.some(([command, args]) => { const result = spawnSync(command, args, { stdio: 'ignore' }); return !result.error && result.status === 0; }); if (!opened) console.log('Open ' + url + ' in your browser.');"
